\tzpentry{ID3364}{Quantum Capacitance Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3364 introduces Quantum Capacitance Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} C_{ \text{quantum}} = \max_{ \rho_{ \text{input}}} [S( \rho_{ \text{output}}) - S( \rho_{ \text{output}| \text{input}})] \end{equation}
